content: Auspex requires a first-class Auspex-owned primary Omegon; generic local attachment is insufficient for the default product state.
The primary Auspex Omegon should launch via `omegon serve --agent <auspex-agent bundle> --control-port 7842 --strict-port` when available.
Anthropic Fable routing is temporarily unavailable; avoid `anthropic:claude-fable-5` until restored.
Auspex-owned runtimes may be lifecycle-managed; user-owned and unknown Omegon processes are attach/probe only unless policy grants control.
